title: Wu Cycle Configuration
description: Configuration for a wu development cycle, embedded in state.json or stored standalone

skip_phases.description: Phases to skip. Cannot include 'learn' or 'ship'.

model_overrides.description: Per-phase model override. Keys are phase names, values are model tiers.

warning_threshold_tokens.description: Token count at which to warn the user

total_tokens_used.description: Running total of tokens consumed in this cycle

max_parallel_agents.description: Maximum number of agents to dispatch in parallel

slop_threshold.description: Slop score threshold (0.0-1.0). Results above this trigger cipher re-verification.

cipher_rounds.description: Per-phase cipher round count. Keys are phase names, values are number of verification rounds.

model_ids.description: Maps ModelTier to full Anthropic model ID strings. Overrides defaults.
